# REPLENISH_STRATEGY_TYPE

**Database:** Operational

**Description:** Stores the various REPLENISH_STRATEGY_TYPEs generated by REPLENISH_STRATEGY_TYPE components.

## Columns

| Name | Data Type | Nullable | Default | Primary | FK To | Description |
|------|-----------|----------|---------|---------|-------|-------------|
| Name | NVARCHAR(50) | False |  | False |  | Unique Name of Replenishment strategy type, available values:  - e-Kanban, - physical Kanban, - replenishment order, Unique value. |
| ReplenishStrategyType | INT(10,0) | False |  | True |  | Unique identifier of a record (key) in a table. |
| TextID | INT(10,0) | True |  | False |  | Unique identifier of the Text. Can be used for translation purposes. |
